headline.purpose: Editable note titles and rare screen-level headings.

title.purpose: Product identity and major page anchors.

shadows.name: interactive-edge
shadows.purpose: Sharpen buttons, fields, and keyboard caps.

shadows.name: surface-separation
shadows.purpose: Separate cards and selected navigation states.

shadows.name: overlay-lift
shadows.purpose: Lift dialogs and sheets above the work surface.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, selection, and compact state feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 0; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.205 0 0)); color: var(--primary-foreground, oklch(0.985 0 0)); font: 500 0.875rem/1.25 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary, oklch(0.205 0 0)) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)) 50%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { filter: brightness(0.94); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: A secondary action with a quiet boundary.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 0.875rem; background: var(--background, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); font: 500 0.875rem/1.25 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--accent, oklch(0.97 0 0)); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)) 50%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline:active { filter: brightness(0.97); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: A compact field with explicit keyboard focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 16rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--input, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 0.875rem; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.45 0 0)); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: A compact active filter with direct state contrast.
components.css: .ds-filter-chip { min-height: 2rem; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 0.875rem; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.205 0 0)); color: var(--primary-foreground, oklch(0.985 0 0)); font: 500 0.75rem/1.25 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-filter-chip:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary, oklch(0.205 0 0)) 90%, transparent); } .ds-filter-chip:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)) 50%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-filter-chip:active { filter: brightness(0.94); }

components.name: Work Card
components.css: .ds-work-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 1.25rem; background: var(--card, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--card-foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-work-card h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.4; font-weight: 600; } .ds-work-card p { margin: 0; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.45 0 0)); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Segmented Navigation
components.description: Compact navigation with a clearly selected destination.
components.css: .ds-segmented { display: inline-flex; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 1rem; background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--muted, oklch(0.88 0 0)) 40%, transparent); } .ds-segmented button { height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; border: 0; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: transparent; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.45 0 0)); font: 500 0.875rem/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: color 150ms, background-color 150ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-segmented button:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--background, oklch(1 0 0)) 70%, transparent); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); } .ds-segmented button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)) 50%, transparent); outline-offset: 1px; } .ds-segmented .ds-segmented-active { background: var(--background, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); }

components.name: Keyboard Shortcut Key
components.description: A compact discoverability hint for keyboard-first workflows.
components.css: .ds-shortcut { display: inline-flex; min-width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 0.375rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 0.25rem; background: var(--muted, oklch(0.88 0 0)); color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.45 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); font: 500 0.625rem/1 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace; }

narrative.overview:
Hustle Hub is a calm, compact operational surface. It should feel like a carefully tuned console: information arrives from several systems, but hierarchy, spacing, and state make the next useful action obvious. The visual system is deliberately restrained so dense work remains readable rather than decorative.

Precision comes from consistent alignment, compact controls, explicit state, and immediate keyboard feedback. Responsive behavior is structural: the dashboard stacks on narrow screens and resolves into three focused columns at the extra-large breakpoint. Motion is limited to short state transitions, loading feedback, and overlays.

The system explicitly rejects the feel of a generic list app with little attention paid to fast scanning, information hierarchy, or precision.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained monochrome surfaces with semantic color reserved for meaning.
Compact, repeated alignment patterns that reward fast scanning.
Keyboard-visible focus states and shortcuts treated as first-class UI.
Flat surfaces at rest, with light depth only where interaction or layering requires it.
Structural responsiveness rather than fluid display typography.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Saturated color must communicate information, status, selection, or risk. It is never ambient decoration.

rules.name: The One Active Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal Ink marks the dominant action or selected state. Competing active controls on the same surface are prohibited.

rules.name: The Dense, Not Tiny Rule
rules.body: Density comes from spacing and hierarchy. Primary work-item content stays at 0.875rem; smaller sizes are reserved for metadata.

rules.name: The Functional Mono Rule
rules.body: Monospace may identify keys, issue IDs, code, or variables. It must never replace the interface's body voice.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: A resting surface does not earn depth merely by being rectangular. Shadow must clarify interaction, selection, or an overlay layer.

dos: Do organize each source around a clear title, compact metadata, and a nearby next action.
Do preserve 0.875rem as the primary dense-content size and reserve 0.625–0.75rem for metadata and keyboard hints.
Do use the 3px focus ring consistently so every interactive workflow is fully operable by keyboard.
Do reserve Action Blue and Critical Red for semantic information and state.
Do keep routine state transitions at 150ms and overlay transitions at 200ms.
donts: Don't make Hustle Hub feel like a generic list app with little attention paid to fast scanning, information hierarchy, or precision.
Don't rely on color alone to communicate status, priority, or selection; pair it with text, icons, or structure.
Don't hide focus indicators or create mouse-only actions.
Don't add decorative motion, page-load choreography, or delays that interrupt the work loop.
Don't introduce a new component shape or interaction vocabulary when an existing button, field, chip, menu, or dialog already fits.
